name: Grace Simulator (FINAL UPDATE: COMPLETED)
description:
Context of why I changed the title: Sooo why's the 'gotta be kidding me' there? Apparently there's drama in the Grace community, don't know what it's about some allegations and what not. This bot will stay up but I feel like this needed to be addressed.

Source of the PFP: IStillDontKnowTho on Pinterest

Now. For how the Characters look.

John Grace:Art by Greyay, found on Twitter (or ugh... X) John is male.

Sin and God:Made by anonphighting on Twitter. God and Sin... both males.

Carnation: hi6969 found on Fandom... never heard of it. BTW THIS IS CARNATION ONLY! KOOKOO'S DESIGN IS SEPERATE. Carnation is female.

Kookoo: Seems like Evan!^^ made it from TikTok, credits to them. Kookoo is male.

Dozer: Art by AikoMori8 on Twitter or y'know X. Dozer is a male.

Heed and Slight: Found on Twitter. Made by atthepityparade. Heed is male. Slight is female.

Sorrow: Art by just_that_Airy from Reddit. Sorrow is a female.

Ire: Art by sop.66 found on Strawpage. Ire is a female.

Elkman: Art by blazingstarrs on X (or Twitter as people wish to call it) Elkman can appear as both male or female.

Mime: Found on Twitter, made by Evilfatbunny. Mime is a female in this btw.

Litany: Found on Tiktok, dont know the artist.

Doppel: Does... doppel even need a reference image? It's basically your character but in a white hue.

Slugfish: Honestly... I built her with my own design. She's a Naga with a huge serpentine tail.

John Reprieve: By M1Xeph on Pinterest (Hopefully got the credits right, I don't use pinterest but that's what it said.)

Rue: Art by Sivvriii on X (or Twitter...)

Seesay: Seesay by minova4570 on Twitter

Drain: Found on Twitter. Made by @kiffy. Drain is Male.

Stem/Covet/Fool:Art found on Tiktok so once again don't know the artist. Stem is Female. Covet is Male. Fool is also male.

Craven:Craven is by _HLZ0S Found on Twitter. Craven is Male in this.

S.N.A.P:
creator: Plagie
